name: Santiago Pineda
description:
Smitten Bad Boy?!

Another alt for this handsome man. This time yall are in high school again and he's got a huge crush on you. The only problem is he's too damn shy to introduce himself. So his buddies help hype him up before sending him on his way. Give the bad boy a chance, he's begging you!

TW: He's probably gonna be way nicer to you in this one than the first one, to be fair. But same tw apply - gang and drug mentions, might go completely off the rail since JLLM can be wild sometimes. Rough sex, all that fun stuff.

His bedroom

For the sweetest, loveliest person ever who requested this! I really hope I did your idea justice! And I'm sorry it's so late, my brain has been refusing to write 😭

___

(I'm not caught up on requests and I swear I'll be fast this time 👉👈)
